name: Tom Barrett
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $305,198 for Tom Barrett in U.S. House, MI-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
